name: agent-key
installHints: AiPlus Agent Key provides alias-based, zero-persistence secret resolution for AI coding agents.

Backend: Bitwarden Secrets Manager (other backends planned). Secrets are resolved at runtime and injected into child-process environment variables only; never written to disk, never printed by default, never committed.
v0.1 documents the existing AiPlus CLI subcommand `aiplus secret-broker`. Source-code extraction into a standalone crate is planned for v0.2.

doctorChecks.description: Example alias TSV present (real schema: 3 tab-separated columns).

notes: Public module record. Code lives in the AiPlus CLI (subcommand `aiplus secret-broker`) for v0.1.
Real secret values must NEVER be committed to this repo or any project repo; alias names only.
This module IS the secret boundary. The module's own files, examples, tests, and CI must never contain real secret values, real account IDs, or real Bitwarden Secrets Manager workspace IDs.
Example aliases use the form `EXAMPLE_<PROVIDER>_<USE>` and are never resolvable to real secrets.
Configuration that references a real secret must live OUTSIDE this repo — in the user's `~/.config/aiplus/profiles/<profile>/secrets.toml` (alias → backend-path mapping, no values).
Extracted from AiPlus's existing `secret-broker` subcommand as a sibling public module.
v0.1 documents the existing feature; v0.2 may physically split the Rust source into its own crate.
CLI surface (status / doctor / list / resolve / run / token) is preserved as `aiplus secret-broker <subcommand>` for backward compatibility.
